chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE ONE WHO IS BORN IN AL-ISLAM

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 369)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 369)
text: النَّبِيَّ (صلى الله عليه وآله) قَالَ ارْحَمُوا عَزِيزاً ذَلَّ وَ غَنِيّاً افْتَقَرَ وَ عَالِماً ضَاعَ فِي زَمَانِ جُهَّالٍ.

en.hubeali: H 14579 – And by this chain, who has narrated the following:
Imamasws said that: ‘The Prophetsaww said: ‘Be merciful towards a mighty one who has been humbled, and a rich one who has become poor, and a scholar who is wasted in the era of the ignorant ones.
en.sarwar: 131. And by this chain, who has narrated the following: Imam (a.s.) said that: ‘The Prophet (saww) said: ‘Be merciful towards a mighty one who has been humbled, and a rich one who has become poor, and a scholar who is wasted in the era of the ignorant ones.
